name: collab/update-status
description: Append a daily EOD status entry to the team collaboration log. When a Block is specified (e.g. after a PR review on a block), also writes a block-scoped entry to blocks/{blockname}/daily-status.md. Use when: end of day status update, logging block work, logging PR review activity.
when_to_use: at the end of the workday to log completed work, in-progress items, blockers, and handoff notes for teammates in other time zones
